git_available.description: Whether git was available at pre-flight (git binary present AND inside a work tree). When false, all git operations are skipped: clean-tree check, per-wave commits, and the PR step. Optional for back-compat with manifests written before 1.3.0.

backend.description: Wave-execution backend selected at pre-flight: 'teams' when CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1 and team tooling is present, else 'subagent'. Optional for back-compat with pre-1.0.0 manifests.

verification.description: Verification coverage config + per-cycle coverage counters. 'mode' is the resolved verify_mode; 'waves_verified'/'waves_skipped' tally how many waves got a semantic verifier versus an honest SKIPPED (e.g. earlier waves under last-wave-only). Optional for back-compat with manifests written before 1.9.0 (absent => the pre-1.9.0 default of one verifier per wave, full coverage).

wave_token_total.description: Sum of every non-null per-agent and verifier total in this wave; null when nothing was reported.

token_usage.description: Best-effort tally of tokens consumed by every dispatched subagent (analyzer, dev agents, wave verifiers, aggregator). Captured from the usage figure the harness surfaces when each subagent completes, falling back to the agent's own token_usage self-report (the last figure the harness surfaced to it in-band) when the completion result carries none; entries are null where neither source yielded a figure. null until the run finalizes the tally. Optional for back-compat with manifests written before 1.5.0.

source.description: Where the figure came from: 'harness' = the completion result's usage summary (authoritative); 'self_report' = the agent's own token_usage return field (a lower bound). Absent when tokens are null, and on manifests written before 1.11.0 (absent = harness).

total_tokens.description: Sum of every non-null per-agent total.

agents_reported.description: Count of dispatched subagents that surfaced a usage figure.

agents_total.description: Count of dispatched subagents in the run.

complete.description: true only when agents_reported == agents_total (every subagent's usage was captured).

code_atlas_sync.description: Outcome of the pre-PR code-atlas index sync (Step 7-bis). null until the step runs. ran=true when /code-atlas:update was invoked; ran=false with a reason when skipped (git not available, or code-atlas not detected). Optional for back-compat with manifests written before 1.4.0.

single_file.description: Single-file invocation with a {file} placeholder, e.g. 'pytest {file}'.

baseline_failing.description: Pre-existing failing tests at pre-flight; subtracted when attributing new failures.

tokenCount.description: Best-effort token usage for one subagent: the harness completion summary when surfaced, else the agent's own token_usage self-report. null when neither source yielded a figure; individual fields may be null when only a single total is reported.

source.description: Where the figure came from. 'self_report' figures are lower bounds. Absent on manifests written before 1.11.0 (absent = harness).
